parameters: Everything's about efficiency lately. It's so oppressive. When it gets
to be too much, I come here to unwind.
Not even the Empire can tear this park down. It's something of a
Back when this was a poor area, this park was fertile farmland.
It was responsible for the survival of many, many people.
Once things eased up, they turned it into a park, and it's still a
beloved place even now. I love it here too.
Mommy! Look at this flower! When you smell it, it smells so nice
What? Do you have a question about the plants? Go ahead and ask.
You won't find anyone more knowledgeable about greenery than me.
